productDisplayName: Carlton London Women Casual Pink Sandals
description: Enhance the simplest of your looks with this slide from carlton london. Walk in comfort and high style in these sandals that exude eye-catching appeal. The footbed has been ergonomically padded and the forefoot strap is adjustable, which makes this one great buy that'll suit a variety of feet.UpperSynthetic leather forefoot strap with a buckle to customise Fit and lock the foot in placeCushioned footbed with ergonomically raised nubs for all-day comfort OutsoleLightweight durable PU outsole with dash grooves on the forefoot and heel for absolute grip and tractionCurved midfoot for inner-arch supportSlipper careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
